snapshot.title: Create a Proton Account | Take back your privacy
snapshot.bodyText: Already have an account? Sign in Sign up to get everything Proton has to offer Get a secure Proton Mail address, or use your current email. Create free account now End-to-end encrypted Every free account comes with: Mail Calendar VPN Drive Pass Lumo Encrypted email with 1 GB storage 1 address, 3 calendars 2000+ VPN servers in 10 countries 5 GB cloud storage for files and photos Collaborative documents and spreadsheets Password manager for all your devices Private AI assistant with encrypted chat history Privacy policy Terms Need help? English
